segments.text: With all the Ganpati's sitting around Me and you,
All The Ganas' sitting in front of me.
I don't know what to say!
It is remarkable very remarkable
because most Of You come from a culture
which has never shown any respect for Shri Ganesha
They have never realized how important it was
that without Shri Ganeshas qualities
We cannot achieve anything in our life, the idea of every day moment to moment enjoyment
has destroyed them.
And also that desire know the Divine, I am rather as well vanishes into thin air because
You get lost into this moment-to-moment enjoyment till you get destructive, completely destroyed.
But I really don't understand how we have achieved these states where the purity is so important to life
that Ganesha's qualities, his value system and His innocence to be imbibed.
I feel very gratified
That such a thing has happened now in your lives
And you all are so much in praise for Shri Ganesh
Shri Ganesha is there from our childhood.
Yesterday you saw the children, how they were so beautiful
and entertained us most!
Everybody had a smile on their face
when I said don't laugh because if we laughed
They feel little offended
And think that You are laughing at them
The enjoyment which We have
From That drama of Children
was more than what one would expect from adults doing that kind of a drama just to entertain
us.
It might be some sort or very subtle joy for Shri Ganesha, which made it so happen
– we all have Shri Ganesh settled nicely within ourselves and in you awakened, awakened
In such a manner that in your free will also you do not want to
things, that we'll go against Shri Ganesha.
His manifestation within is so evident
You see Your faces they are
beautifully shining
So very different from other people
One day I was travelling from London
and there's one Indian lady who came to see Me
And she said, I was surprised to see your disciples.
Their faces were shining with such light!
–I've never seen any disciples like that.
But then I asked her who are you?
She said," I'm married in Guru Nanak's family."
And all the people in his family are just opposite what Shri Guru Nanaka was.
So I said, because they worship Sri Ganesha
so she says that
In our families nobody worships Shri Ganesh
and it cannot be possible
How is this?
No we will
They believe in
Nirakar
The formless God of Chaitanya
I said, but who is the source of that chaitanya?
Why don't they find out Who's The Source.
So They Said That Nanaka Has Only Talked Up To This Point
He Is Not Talking About The Source
And i said better Find Out
Because in this book maybe some things have been taken away
and then somebody gave Me a passage
Where he had described the innocence, the deity of Shri Ganesha also.
He has describe that whole creation was done by mother and not father
It's very surprising because Nirakaris those people who don't believe in
In the forms of God always talk a father, not
Of The Mother. It is true also
about Christianity
Also About Islam
and also
About
The Jews
All them they talked of the Father
And Not Of The Mother
Nor About Shri Ganesha
It seems, in the ancient time they believed
In child God. Even China
even Greece and also many other countries
who were supposed to be primitive
but all believe in their child god
So now when we deal with our children
We should know that
They are just like Shri Ganesh
They are very innocent, very simple except in cases sometimes they're affected by some things and they lose their moorings.
But Shri Ganesha's greatest contribution to Sahaja Yoga is that He makes you feel My vibrations
He makes you feel the beauty of purity and simplicity, only possible if Shri Ganesha
is awakened within him.
Also kundalini won't rise without this chanceler – he's one sitting on Muladhara
But you should know He is on every chakra.
Innocence cures all the qualities, physical mental emotional especially spiritual one
but Shri Ganesha's quality most important that he believes in emitting vibration
He believes in projecting His vibrations to everyone.
That is the quality now I feel all of you as Sahaja Yogis can use
You got your realization without any effort,
it was such that life before Self-realization
You got your transformation and you have jumped into the new era of, as I say, of meta-science.
But here now we've to see whatever they are what do with it?
You of course know that you have to give realizations
To others,
That is why you have to cure people.
And love them and be compassionate
But apart from all this
Now the deliberations about yourself
Have started
This is through Shri Ganesha's powers
Which are with him
If we see
that you can emit your powers,
Your energy to others.
You project it into other's
Now for example
if somebody comes to meet
If know how deliberately
project your energy
this is a new type of meditation
practice
That to emit your energy
projects your energy
to others. You don't have say anything, you don' t have talk but just feel deliberately
again I said deliberately it's not such spontaneous this is what your practice is
to emit energy of your innocence of Shri Ganesha so when they see their innocence
would be awakened. Now for example, say we had some problems in London and Sahaja Yogis
told Me Mother there are still you know men looking at us
And Some said that the..some...there were many women who
was looking it as a mutual sort of thing going on
I said You can project your energy
In such a manner that, that projection will stop all this kind of stupid behavior
Of other people and also make them understand, respect you
And feel your dignity. Not very difficult
But on the contrary as culture is to attract men
men attract women, it will diminish. The energy
will diminish when you feel your own dignity
and serenity
that now self-realized people are not ordinary
a kind of majestic personality
develops within them. That majestic personality
really can have tremendous effect
on the surrounding people. Tremendous!
It's a kind of deliberate projection you should start,
I don't know that side
how to project it or
and deliberately do
its just spontaneous with Me
but You can achieve
With little practice try
To face such
people, with not disdain or contempt but just your majestic personality.
This personality is here now you see sitting in such a majestic manner and he's also
giving the vibrations to others – this whole figure doing something suddenly
To expect that the whole world will change spontaneously is, I don't think it's all right.
Because you know – The World Is so chaotic full of chaos
So much ego and conditioning
But something within You can rise above others
With your sense of dignity, with you complete self-hood.
Where do You stand in yourself?
Your not to be rude and your are not to be egotistical
We needn't say things if we don' t want anything
Just that silent personality can emit such beautiful vibrations
which have stored up a lot of vibrations
And this storing up is showing on your faces, which I said are shining.
But the innocence that you have –
You've to be proud of it! Very much proud
Even now sometimes
You feel that people will say you are not properly dressed up or maybe your ugly looking
and all kinds of things they expect every other person to be.
It's a funny thing, in this world
All human beings expect others very good
Everybody should become heroes
What about themselves? They never think
So now you have become heroes in the sense that spiritually,
your much higher than all of them.
And so this projection when it starts I am saying again deliberate
then we should not be afraid
That i'll develop my ego
Should Not Be Afraid
But just
In a way with understanding
that you have these powers within you, beautifully expressing themselves as a child does.
You see if there's one child it can entertain at least hundred people
What is so sweet about the childish? The innocence
The way he speaks, the way He talks.
The ways he behaves
and expresses His love is so simple
but it has something in the essence
this innocence of Shri Ganesha
Anywhere there's a question for children
that whole world gets worried about
The whole world wants to solve the problem.
If a child is in trouble anywhere, all over
it will be circulated that such and
things are happening with this child
And everybody would worry
if they see their children
anywhere
faces change
expression changes automatically
Because that child is emitting that innocence without any deliberations,
Without a special way of doing it but just spontaneously.
But then you grow and start growing with others who are also not innocent
You have to meet them because they can't run away from the society
You start getting all the rapport with such people who are talking about things, actually
those that criticize Shri Ganesha.
Gradually your innocence starts dying out and you feel sometimes inferior to
all those who are supposed to be very great warriors against innocence.
In the sense that when I was in London,
they used laugh at me because of this kunkum
but think why am wearing it?
They're so ignorant there!
Very ignorant people don't know
in India, all the married women have to wear this.
Even Muslims were that they also wore Mangal Sutra
so I said
That This is just written down on my head
.That i am a married woman
It's Just To Tell People
That don't bother Me and
,I've got My husband behind me
And he can take you to task
This kind of ignorance is so much in the West and still they think
They are a higher race,
there're greater people.
There don't know even small-small things about life
For their innocence I thing
that have lost any knowledge
About it long time back
And
That's how It Is
A society today
which is absolutely lost its own moorings.
Every individual separate, every individual doing something
and they don't know each other
without innocence you cannot have a rapport with the others
because that means
we had some sort of lust or greed behind whole thing
so much now it's become so boring
the whole thing. That even once I told a Sahaja Yogi that if you are going there, this family
and they have daughter so just give these presents to her simple things now this yogi
was quite an elderly person not young boy he said mother i better no go why because
because they will misunderstand. What will the misunderstanding?
Why am I giving a present to this girl?"
I said, but it's I'm given what is now.
No! That' s psychology he was himself a psychologist
that''s the psychology so i cannot take
these presents for those girls
For Indians you don't understand
This kind of fear
But then I noticed its too much
that they don't want to be with any woman,
They do not wanna alone within a women
and the said mother you dont know these women.
There will make rape case against us but how?
The do so whole idea is
challenge innocence of people
for there I must say
they made this Freud into a God
Because of his writings, I don't know how they accept also such writing.
Can't understand why do you think so because
They have no idea as to what their are
Somebody asked Me about Freud
What did he say?
Why people were against it
Why are you so against
He said that there is a bad relationship between the mother and her son
He just jumped
He said, so? My goodness! Thank God he never came to India.
Otherwise we would have cut him into pieces and put them in the Indian sea."
I said but why spoil the purity of Indians here also?!
She was so annoyed an angry
she said how could they tolerate such a nonsense
How can accept this kind of nonsense against their mother
They had no puberty
That's what troubled her
The trouble is that brain developed too much
Ego developed too much and any such stupid idea, it's much worse than stupid was accepted.
And that is how I find so boring every time anywhere you go its nothing but this sex business
– It' s too-much!
I can't understand how people go on tolerating – it's all right, at the most in some
films and other films you might show some nonsense.
But every time when we see something suddenly this kind of a nonsensical scene is coming
these bedroom scenes…
And they like that?
They pay for them!
They want to have all aspects of it.
It is such a natural thing, what is there
To talk about it? All the time I don't understand
Its only that development in brain
Of such manner
That every kind nonsense wants to accept
So What? Whats wrong?
You are mad! Thats why you go to lunatic asylum
Lunatics also talks like this
So whats wrong?
Same way
Because of such acceptance they don't know how much people have ruined their family life,
the children's lives.
In every way we find that whole society is full off this nonsense
and specially in television, Italy especially
I mean certain buttons you should not press
You must be very careful otherwise do no what to face
and you go for vomiting.
You see, as Indians first reaction is to vomit
but people who have not yet realized the value of this innocence
can be easily taken up by these kinds nonsense that's going on
whatever it through the blessings of Shri Ganesha
You are all transformed, you're on a different line.
Yesterday these two musicians were surprised
how they were praising Ganesha –
They couldn't believe it!
How could we praise Shri Ganesh?
Because then…
…you have not even heard the name of Shri Ganesa before
I said that see what Shri Ganeshas has done to them
how He has made their attention so beautiful
that they enjoy all the beautiful things of world,
All innocent thing in this world.
And there are many people like them I can tell you
who were struggling not at all society accepted these nonsense
There is a lot of struggle because I know in England
They published book about what children have to say
about the politicians – very sweet, sweet things. Very sweet and those books were published
where five thousand books because if you publish five-thousand you get it cheaper or
something like that
And in one day all of these books are sold out
In One Day
That shows
There is so many people still
who are respecting their innocence
They want to be innocent
And they want to enjoy it, but a society has
To be created of that now. For
That you must have
A kind
Of personality
You know
I was in London and
Once
I went
To Greece
The minister's wives also came
To meet me
I was surprised
Normally
They don't do
So they said
Our husbands told us
If we wanted serenity personified
Then
and you must see Mrs. Srivastava, I was surprised in Greece they are talking of serenity!
In these modern times anybody is talking about purity?
I just couldn't understand but i felt at the back their mind that tradition whatever
it be this men could say simple thing to me
And they went and told them, and they all enjoyed My company very much.
I was making them laugh
telling things to one another
One of the turned around and said
Mrs Shavastha you are just like a child
Really?
No we enjoy your company so much
When i came there were tears
So what am saying is that
whatever innocent personality
You have to project
To project towards others
Say somebody trying to be funny with you
Just with one glance you can put that person right, but You don't like it.
just to say You do not like in a way
That's the projection
around your society
Around where we are working
We will also find people who have no sense of innocence
and is disgusting
To be with them
But as he has powers
you must use, is to project.
I see with Sahaja Yogis they don't even cure people
They'll tell Me Mother he's to be cured that it should done
but You are so many why do need me
To go there now?
Now all can cure a patient
and help the patients
Why cant'you do It?
What Is The Need for Me
Do It?
You have those qualities within You
because potentially
you had them before and now they're enlightened through the grace of Shri Ganesha.
Now what we have to do is assert in that, off course not use your ego or mind so somebody
would say that Mother without Mind how can You impress others? How can We have a rapport
with others, very simple. Just go thoughtless – once you are thoughtless
You're in the realm of The Divine and then The Divine takes charge
And it will start emitting such beautiful vibrations that
we'll be amazed at yourself how things have working out
It is not a coincidence we should say
Like one I was going somewhere
And they told Me that, you have to be very careful.
I said why? Because in the night
these Naxalites are here and
They might just kill You!
He said it's all right
he said no its' too late
Be careful
So
The gentleman with me was
Very much worried
He said take out your ornaments
Everything
Put them under a seat
And did everything
so
As soon as we reached
That place where many Naxals were standing
lanterns and with their sticks. So I told the driver that for one minute you stop
your car, he said no i will not ,you stop .I looked at them
And then what happened? They just moved on
I said now speed up my car
You see it is power
That u have unless or until
U use this power of love
And compassion
You will not know what you have got here, and that comes from your Shri Ganesha.
See how children understand love – if they are nice to them…how do they react?
Maybe sometimes it's true or not but 99% of the time I've seen
They really react in our school in Dharamshala
There were two children and they were very troublesome to begin with,
And the parents where worried about them.
They sent him to Dharamshala
Otherwise there was a demanding as modern children are
You buy this you that go here we want McDonalds
This is what's going on
When he went into school for one year
He came back
The parent asked him
Now, what do you want?"
He said.
We don't want anything!
Don' t want anything?
Want to go McDonald's?
They were American."
No no we dont wanna go to Mcdonalds ,we want sit here and watch mothers videos.
They said this suddenly what has happened with them they are so troubled sir why
have now so much change ? What is the matter of it?
So then he asked about food whatever your cook will eat not bothered . They
They were amazed how these children had changed.
Then they said, but we must go out somewhere and see the river, all right that will do
then again came home with no demands nothing, didn't want to go for any shopping or asking
for any shirts or blouse of it, nothing – very much satisfied dignified.
So he they said what's the matter with you?
You don't want anything!
No we want something but we do not know how to tell him so
What is It?
Because We dont have that
and can get in market
Oh!
What Is IT?
He Said Can You Get Us a Pendant Of Shri Mataji
So sweetly, you know they said. That's all!
But They say we don't have any so You just get us the pendant of Shri Mataji
I mean it is such a deep expression
We do not want anything else
i mean ,I knew The children and met them but
Have Not been with Them for long time
And never be close to them nothing
But look at the love that they have.
And,
They were telling Me in school beginning
That anybody was to trouble us we said
Now We are going inform Shri Mataji
No no don't inform her
Why?
Because She will not Love me anymore
Can you imagine
The value of My love
Is so much understood by these little children
and So Much
They admire, they want it.
It has no material gain by that – nothing!
All this really shows
Christ as He said
you have to be like small children
and enter into the Kingdom of God
without which
You cannot enjoy anything
Like yesterday's program was
I must say
these Swiss have worked very hard
They're very hardworking, I know but not to this extent that they started singing Indian
music so well in such a combination and we all enjoyed it.
Now imagine these Swiss who are overactive always working –I don't
now-they have no time thinking about creating something innocent or sweet of
And the way they did it, I mean shows really that
They love Shri Ganesha and they understand
The value of Shri Ganesa's manifestation in them.
We…I was surprised how could learn all this Indian music
So many sitting together singing
That song
There were some Indians I said can you sing like
This? No!
Look at these face
This is the power of Shri Ganesha's law, because they were to celebrate Shri Ganesa's birthday.
So They got equipped from within but if they had not projected it there would have been nothing
so whatever He has given you ,whatever he is creating in You this beautiful innocence
This beautiful fragrance of your living, every moment when you are enjoying it also know that we have to give
It To Others. We Have to pour this into others and it will work out I Know
it will work out. It is so tremendous, its powers are so tremendous! Yesterday you saw
that in the children's program – nobody could beat Him even Shiva or anyone and
Shiva had to cut His head because He didn't know how to overpower Him otherwise.
This is what we have to understand that if you are innocent, nobody can cheat us.
Nobody can trouble us because in innocence
You become a person who doesn't care for
What's happening with him
We became the person who tolerates everything
Thinking these things
Don´t even think
Feel there something stupid people
That all
It is a story about the king in China, as I am going to China.
There was this King of China – they are very wise people
and we say Chinese are extremely wise
And he had decided
To win what you call a cox fight
Imagine that the King thinking like
But it's all child's play
So He went one great saint
and told him that, how will you train a cock to fight the other cocks?
He said leave the cock with Me.
So he left his cock there
And
she trained Him very well
because when King arrived after one month before
The Fight
She said see now take this cock as we are done
They said This One
This Ones is not doing anything just standing straight
they said yes that's it, You Take It
So he took that cock and showed it, I mean put him in the contest.
so all cocks were together
They started troubling this cock
with just standing like these as if some stupid people are trying to trouble Me
He wouldn't touch them
would not react
nothing of a kind
Just standing straight
All the cocks were surprised
This one is no protesting
He's just bearing up everything, and he is not bothered as to what we are doing.
One by one all the cocks disappeared from that field where they were having these fights
And this was only cock which stood out
So The King Was surprised
He took him to the saint and he said,
this one has become a Saint now.
So it's better you keep with Him."
It is such as saying
that they were all trying trouble Him
but He was least bothered looking like
left side right-side both sides
thought what going on these people
why are behaving so?
This I have tell You
your personality itself
Is made Like That
And Now you worship Him
so much She within you
And any kind of problems that you have will be really solved very easily if
You take to your innocence and
That we'll create coincidences as they call it.
But I would say is not coincidence,
It's the vibrations
That, you'll be amazed how things are solved.
You will say Mother this had happened that
Now see the other day it rained so much
It rained So Much
They said all became knee deep
But here and Mother what we do
I said its alright leave to Him
Next Day
It was very hot
Imagine underneath these
Things The whole thing got
Dried out
and today you are here for the puja.
It's an impossible thing that there could be such a change
in weather,
That one day it rains so heavily
And second-day
The whole things gets absolutely dried out
Is his work
Because he is much powerful
You have come to worship him
So first of all cleansing has been done
And He did the cleansing by putting the rain here, so heavy rains and some of the part
of the rains which came near this Palazzo d'Orio they turned into what you call them
–into ice.
I don't know English word is that?
So They all started…and whole thing went round the house, You see!
They were all forming into little, little ice balls falling nearby.
Now it is something unbelievable that
All over It Is just rain only near our house
which is the Ice Balls are coming
We can call it miracles we
Can Call it anything but
But it's Shri Ganesha's
I should say sensitivity
That thought
that now this rain is going near My Mother's house, so let us make some sort of a beautiful
ice balls. And I went out and saw –and was amazed– how it all around My House
there were iceballs! What He can do? what His capable is absolutely unbelievable. How
He guides you and how he helps, how He takes to right path.
Not only that but also how He protects all the time He is with
because You have become His Ganas now – You are
His Ganas so He protects you looks after
gives you all the guidance. He takes to your right path,
he take's You on a righteous road
and gives All that is Dharmic to enjoy
.You always meet friends here or there
,you think it as coincidence but not
And this how He works
with all His beautiful sweet loving attention
on you, because You are His Ganesha – ganas.
But the ganas have to work!
As I say that in our body there
are ganas and they fight
disease… They fight
problems which are in your body
those antibodies
Which?
Are The Ganhas of Shri Ganesha
In same way you also are His ganas
He does all this for you
He protects you, loves and gives all the good time.
Then what are we doing about it?
It should not be one-sided!
When he does this for us
then how can we do about Shri Ganesha
What can we as antibodies
You don't have to fight
with any sword or any kind of weapon
The enemies you can conquer by simple two methods.
One is try your love,
Your pure Love on them – Try that!
You may melt away many people
or else if this-that it's not working
then what should we do
Is to sit down and meditate
And give bandhanas
There are ways of giving bandhans
the Bandan works so fast
And so beautifully that you are amazed how it has worked, because You're so powerful.
The way You give bandhan anybody else can do – It is not going to work!
Is only You the Sahaja Yogis who gives Bandhaan?
There different types of bandhans we have given and all those works out well
So now We've got faith in our own powers
And we have to know that, we are now empowered by Shri Ganesha
To do the work of Sahaja Yoga.
Do not feel you're doing it but Shri Ganesh is doing
You'll be surprised giving realizations
It's the greatest joy Sahaj Yogis can have
and then don't think you've done it
Then its best
you have done it, then I'm very tired or I've done this. Many people come and tell Me
Mother we had these things that means they are just feeling the strain of doing anything
but You're not to feel any strain His powers
Are within me
You can see believe in yourself
Have confidence in yourself
Confidence
and faith in yourself, and that you are a storehouse of innocence which is nothing
but compassion. If You have the faith ,you will definitely develop beautiful way
talking to others or having relationship with other . It's something
That is really a gift of Shri Ganesha.
I don't think, ever shouted at anyone
even on My children have never shouted
Never!
Have not got into fury or temper
because i can manage without it
Of course
I had to correct
and tell people
but one thing has seen
that everybody has been afraid
of one thing, that somehow I should never drive out somebody from Sahaja Yoga.
Because Sahaja Yoga is such a joy!
It's just an energy-giving thing – it has such light and you feel absolutely confident
about yourself so to ask You leave Sahaj yoga is the greatest punishment because
You can't leave Me now, it's difficult.
Just you just cant'leave Me – is impossible
and that what It Is
That…you also develop those qualities
…that YOU can't leave Me
See a child
if he is lost
I mean the parents go off
they don´t know how their child is lost
But supposing some
son of theirs
He was very bad boy
misbehaving
doing all kinds wrong things
They dont mind
But when they are young, their innocent it's some sort of a tremendous attachment to them
and understanding that there our children we have look after.
So this innocence attracts you
That keeps wondering about your children
About other children
And I was very happy the way he gave present
because he's doing a very difficult task, I must say.
And this appreciation shows that to you it is
valuable your children are looked after
but also the child of mother
as result
You have all these powers within yourself
But know how smile
Know how win over people
Still there some Sahaja Yogis and Sahajyoginis
who are still rather stiff, I find them little stiff-time and they can't give up their stiffness.
Maybe the think no end of themselves or whatever it is then there will not enjoy Sahaja Yoga
Of course mentally understand Sahaj yoga all that but cannot fully enjoy Sahaja Yoga
and its mirth, its joyous movements.
Today is to celebrate His birth
And He was the first God that was created on this earth
because he's also auspiciousness
–he has also holiness
So the Primordial Mother didn't want
To create This world without first creating
The Holiness
the auspiciousness, the purity.
And that's why He was first created
–created on this earth with vibrations just bundled of vibrations–
so That he can look after all people
who are going to come from ages-to-ages
and guide them always
in their right path
So HE is supposed be in charge
of our conscience, the conscious that eats you up sometimes
and says this is not all right. This I should have done
That i shouldn't had not done
But one try to take very great pride in it
Like there was a gentleman an Indian
Indians can be exceptionally innocent sometimes
Exceptionally
You cant understand them
So I told him why did he give your land
He said, Mother I thought that later on when my children will grow
might become greedy and may not give this land to My brother
who deserves it. Because am too clever
so can cheat him
So I gave up the land
He was telling Me
That
should not become greedy
because maybe
that my children will grow up and I'll feel
That i must give all this to My Children.
So,I decided
To Give Up the Land just now
...to My own brother
But ,i said what about your Brother?
He said he deserves
..he needs
.I don't need so much land
......I'm doing very well in life
Thats why have given
but legally
Legally set it was
not
In His name
.....but I thought
It's better
that I gave
to Him now
Later on
I might become a bad man
So the innocence works out in such a manner.
A very sweet, sweet story I've got to tell you
There's one Sahaja Yogi was little boy say about sixteen years of old
